title: Construction
body:
# Construction Side Deco
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/sXsAMgQ.png)


### 📖 About:

This mod adds many new decorative blocks to the game.
Among them blocks from the theme Construction Side

### ✅ Features:

About 10 new decorative blocks
Construction Lamp, Traffic Cone, and more...


### ❓ F.A.Q. 

Can you bring out the mod for 1.12?
I do not plan to bring out the mod for 1.12.
